title: Monster Can
description: Transform the boring Vanilla Potion into Delicious Monster Cans
body:
![Title](https://i.postimg.cc/q7vP7kjQ/image.png)

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/tFmJ75xp86) [![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/canvasofsouls) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/github-plural_64h.png)](https://github.com/Coconite/Coconite-Datapacks)

# 📖 Description

Tired of having to use the boring vanilla potions? Enhance your Minecraft experience with this Resourcepack.

This Resource pack changes the Drinkable Potions into Dark Monster Cans

![Transformation](https://i.postimg.cc/d1PtZkXp/transform.png)

And also this resourcepack changes the Splash Potion into epic White Monster Cans

![White Transform](https://i.postimg.cc/mrh81hMK/transform-white.png)

---

# 👾 Bugs/Issues

The version 1.2 of this resourcepack may have incompatibility with other resourcepacks and Shaders. Delete the folder "assets\minecraft\shaders" if you have issues.

(If you use the latest version, you will not have any rendering issues)

Also, you can report another bug in the [github](https://github.com/DeWonknuOff/Resourcepacks) of my friend.
